metadata.name: Legal Case Analyst (Dataverse)
metadata.description: An AI-powered legal case analyst that queries structured case data in Dataverse to build timelines, cross-reference witness statements, identify discrepancies, and prepare case summaries for attorneys.

content.description: Analyzes legal case data stored in Dataverse including timelines, witness statements, discrepancies, and involved parties across 50 cases.
conversationStarters: Build a complete timeline for case 2024-DR-42-0892
Who are the key parties in the Webb/Holloway case?
Find all discrepancies across witness statements in case 2024-DR-42-0892
Summarize what each parent said about the incident on June 15
Which cases involve TPR proceedings in Richland County?
